target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible fire and smoke emanating from the rear/side of the equipment; visible scorching on the exterior; major components appear generally intact but affected by fire

summary: One target assessed: 1 military_equipment, condition DAMAGED with PROBABLE confidence. The likely functional impact is degradation of capability due to visible fire and scorching.
